title: GTS Legends
description: The best GTS mod for Pixelmon 1.12.2
body:
GTS Legends

 

This is a GTS addon for Pixelmon Reforged 1.12.2 we developped for our server "Pixelmon Legends", as we stopped running our server I'm making it public so everybody can use it and have fun !

 

Through the interface you can sell items, pokemons and place announcements ! Admins can cancel listings, and ban specific items to be sold.

 

Within item listing you can sell more than one stack at once, just stack more on top of it ! Prices are defined as unit price, do players can buy the quantity they like.

 

Within pokémon listing you can see a lot of informations about the pokemon, and see their sprites. The admins have a way in config files to define minimum price.

 

Here are the permissions to manage it :

  • gts.admin : Allows the player to use admin features such as the admin GUI
  • gts.sell_pokemon : Allows the player to sell pokemon
  • gts.sell_item : Allows the player to sell items.
  • gts.place_ad : Allows the player to place ads.
  • gts.vip : Increases the limits of max listings of the player.

 

 

Installation:

 

For players:

Install Forge 1.12.2 - 14.23.5.2860

Place Pixelmon Reforged Universal 1.12.2 (Pixelmon Reforged), Creative Core (Creative Core), and GTS Legends Client (Link)  into mods folder

 

Run and connect to a server with mod installed

 

 

For servers:

Use a forge server software on 1.12.2

Have Pixelmon Reforged Server 1.12.2 in mod folder, as well as Creative Core and GTS Legends Server (Link)

Place config file "gts.json" in the "config" folder of your server

Place "gts_player_data.json" into the root of the server.

 

 

 

Hope you like it, and if you can, pease support us ! ❤️
